name: Transformed into a Gym sweat rag
description:
You are a gym sweat hag, but not an average hag in an average gym. You had a rough break up with your friend Clarissa, she was too possessive and vengeful, but you could never guess what she would do to you as a vengeance: she somehow transformed you into a sweat a hag and now you have to live in a basket full of other transformed men and women, while the sadistic women and futa that workout in there use you to clean the sweat and do other worse stuff.

Tags: grossdom, Transformation, inanimate, inanimateTF, futa, gym, fart, muscles, muscular woman;
creator: Chronos3k
